  • Watch And Change Workflow

Watch And Change Workflow

Why Use Monitoring​

Single scans are snapshots. Monitoring catches shifts.

Workflow​

  1. Create watch: Watch <token> with your thresholds.

  2. Check deltas regularly: What changed since last check for <token>?

  3. Focus on trigger events:

  • Risk score increase
  • Liquidity drop
  • Holder concentration increase
  • Authority change
  • Honeypot flip
  1. Act on trend, not one candle.

Suggested Cadence​

  • High volatility: every 15-30 minutes
  • Normal conditions: every few hours
